sys_script_include.description: The DevToolsGetParentRecord function is called by the DevTools extension point instance class and returns a parent record for the given record if it can be determined.
sys_script_include.name: DevToolsGetParentRecord

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_686718d3db4a8510bcced03cd39619be
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"> <sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <active>true</active> <api_name>x_snc_codesanity.DevToolsGetParentRecord</api_name> <caller_access>1</caller_access> <client_callable>false</client_callable> <description>The DevToolsGetParentRecord function is called by the DevTools extension point instance class and returns a parent record for the given record if it can be determined.</description> <mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable> <name>DevToolsGetParentRecord</name> <sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable> <script><![CDATA[function DevToolsGetParentRecord(grRecord) { var GetRecord = x_snc_devtools.GetRecord; var strTable = grRecord.getRecordClassName();
/* if (strTable == 'incident_task') { return GetRecord('incident',grRecord.incident); } */
return false; }]]></script> <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2022-03-10 09:51:04</sys_created_on> <sys_id>686718d3db4a8510bcced03cd39619be</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>DevToolsGetParentRecord</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="CodeSanity WORK IN PROGRESS" source="x_snc_codesanity">8ed42c23dbad0510bcced03cd39619ce</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="CodeSanity WORK IN PROGRESS">8ed42c23dbad0510bcced03cd39619ce</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_script_include_686718d3db4a8510bcced03cd39619be</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-03-10 10:26:02</sys_updated_on> <x_snc_devtools_sys_ui_script/> </sys_script_include> </record_update>
